examples:
Command Example
!minemeld-get-indicator-from-miner miner=Suspicious indicator=7.7.7.7
War Room Output
5. Get IP address indicator
Retrieves all occurrences of the specified IP address, including the context in which it is found.
For this command to succeed, the miner (associated with the IP address indicator) has to be on a Cortex XSOAR block list or allow list.
Base Command
ip

!minemeld-get-indicator-from-miner miner=Suspicious indicator=7.7.7.7
War Room Output
5. Get IP address indicator
Retrieves all occurrences of the specified IP address, including the context in which it is found.
For this command to succeed, the miner (associated with the IP address indicator) has to be on a Cortex XSOAR block list or allow list.
Base Command
ip
Input
name: ip

outputs.description: The Indicator DBotScore.Type The Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The DBot score vendor DBotScore.Score The DBot score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the vendor defined the IP address as malicious IP.Malicious.Description For malicious IP addresses, the reason why the vendor defined the IP address as malicious
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: IP address IP.MineMeld.Indicators Entire indicator object
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: Indicator value IP.MineMeld.Indicators.miner Miner of the indicator
outputs.name: IP.MineMeld.Indicators.indicator

outputs.description: Entire indicator object MineMeld.Indicators.indicator Indicator value
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators

outputs.description: Miner of the indicator MineMeld.Indicators.type Indicator type
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators.miner

outputs.description: Indicator comment MineMeld.Miner Entire miner object
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators.comment
